name: Vascular PTA (Percutaneous Transluminal Angioplasty)
description: Interventional radiology vascular PTA procedure report template

findings.technique: Percutaneous transluminal angioplasty performed under fluoroscopic guidance via [radial / femoral / brachial] access. Balloon sized appropriately to target vessel.
findings.comparison: Procedure performed for [stenosis / occlusion] of [vessel name] as demonstrated on pre-procedural imaging.

sections.name: Access
sections.content: Access obtained via [right/left] [radial/femoral/brachial] artery using [21G] micropuncture set.

sections.name: Target Vessel
sections.content: Target [vessel name] demonstrates [percentage] stenosis [pre-procedure / post-procedure] measuring [X]mm in diameter.

sections.name: Angioplasty Results
sections.content: [Ballooninflated to X atm for X seconds / Stent deployed / No dissection or perforation identified]. Final residual stenosis estimated at [percentage].

sections.name: Runoff
sections.content: Three-phase runoff [demonstrates / does not demonstrate] brisk flow through the treated segment with [no distal embolization / evidence of distal embolization requiring intervention].

impression:
1. Successful PTA of [vessel name] with [residual stenosis <30%/significant residual stenosis requiring further intervention].
2. [No complications / Access site complication / Dissection / Perforation] noted.
author: RadReport Templates
